items.title: TPA - SELF FUNDED
items.content:
• 1199 SEIU Greater New York Benefit Fund-ALL POLICIES SELF FUNDED 
  • UMR - ALL POLICIES SELF FUNDED PPO 
  • CIGNA CANTEX- ALL PPO SELF FUNDED-PER REP BETHANY REF#169185-F10/6/2023 
  • UHSM- ALL POLICIES ARE PPO AND SELF FUNDED PER REP ROTHA C REF#00068321 10/6/2023 
  • BCBS Federal "R" POLICY – All self-funded PPO 
  • UFCW National Health and Welfare Fund- a self-insured fund since 1955 
  • GEHA all policies are PPO SELF FUNDED 
  • Magna Care is a TPA for Self-funded plans only 
  • American Plan Adm PER REP TIN L ALL POLICIES ARE SELF FUNDED REF#TIN L 10/18/2023000001-01 
  • Maestro Health-FWFF 44 ACTIVE BASE IS SELF FUNDED PER REP SHAHINDA REF #2374004- 10/30/2023 
  • SEIU HEALTH AND WELFARE FUND-SELF FUNDED PPO 
  • EMI HEALTH IS TPA ADMIN, THEY ARE SELF FUNDED. 
  • On EOB or INS CARD WHEN IT SAYS "Administered by" it is a Self-Funded HP 
  • ALL SAVERS all policies are self-funded 
  • All plans through HPI (Health plans, INC & Health Plan Services) are self-funded through the employers 
  • 90 Degree- TPA self-funded  
  • WebTPA are self-funded  
  • Meritain Health- self funded 
  • EBMS- Employee Benefit Management Services- is a third-party administrator of self-funded health plans, Founded in 1961 
  • Boon-Chapman has administered self-funded health plans 
  • N A L C HEALTH PLAN - We provide services to individuals covered by Taft-Hartley trusts and Federal Employee Health Benefit (FEHB) plans as part of our Shared Administration Repricing (SAR) program for self-funded administrative services only (ASO) benefit plans. 
  •  StarMark per rep Shannon N all plans are self-funded ref 2400053305  
  • Any insurance that has FEHBP - Is Federal/Self-Funded  
  • Liberty Health Share is self-funded  
  • Health Choice per rep Elizabeth M all policy is Self-Funded with ref # 61503 07/11/2024 
  • Cypress Benefits Adm is now Lucent Health – Self Funded 
  • Entrust all policies are self-funded 
  • TSHB is self-funded  
  • Unified Group Services per rep Ranissa all plans are self-funded. They do not have an ONN Email they only accept appeals via Fax 765-608-6689 REF RANISSA 07/18/2024 
  • Foreign Service Benefit Plan all policies are self-funded 
  • Assured Benefits Administrators- self funded  
  • UHC- GROUP # MOONEX- MO On Exchange is Self-Funded 
  • Employer Health network- is self funded 
  • Health Now Administrative Services – TPA Self funded health plan 
  • Bucknell University. They offer self-funded plans from Geisinger Health. 
  • QualChoice – Per Charlotte (reference number: 10182024016), all City of Fort Smith Arkansas group are self-funded-POS QualChoice – Per Charlotte (reference number: 10182024016), all City of Fort Smith Arkansas group are self-funded-POS with group #: 00090008  
  • QualChoice – Per Ashley (reference number: 10182024065), all Randall Ford group are Fully Insured-PPO with group #: 00055330 
  • GHMSI (CareFirst BCBS) MD - Federick County Public Schools - PPO - Blue Choice Advantage - Self-Funded, group#: 001902842MD10 
  • GHMSI (CareFirst BCBS) MD - Howard County Public School - Blue Choice HMO - Self-Funded, group#: 001901454MD10 
  • GHMSI (CareFirst BCBS) MD - Medstar Health Inc -PPO - Self-Funded, group#: 001903980MDF00 
  • Carefactor – Self-Funded PPO regardless of the State REF # 214177 
  • HealthComp North with group# 113459 – all plans are PPO/Self-funded per call on 11/20/24 rep Kia ref#7229415 
  • HealthComp North with group # HC1123- all plans are Self-Funded/Open Access, spoke with Asja S., call reference # 8299393. 
  • PEBB Statewide considering that ASO is a health plan administered by Providence Health 
  • Health First TPA – (Quantum Health 877-559-4055),  EOB Address -Health First 821 ESE Loop 323 – Group number 0070900 Self-funded PPO 
  • Health First : GRP# 0000140 - Made outbound call to Health First @ (800) 477-2287, SW Tiffany B., confirmed plan is SELF FUNDED/OTHERS. Additionally, all GRP# 0000140 are all SELF FUNDED. REF#161040. 
  • Iroquois Central School District (if the patient is an employee of the district, not student, check date of birth) Independent Health (TPA) 800-257-2753 Must call to confirm. 
  • Samba federal employee benefits association - FEP 
  • Kansas Building Trades all policies are  self-funded Michelle W 4.11.25 
  •  Ameriben IEC Group / Ameriben Solutions / Healthlink is a TPA and has been with Ameriben since 01/01/2021 REF#16395329 – Ameriben policies end with SOI 
  • ALLEGIANCE BENEFIT PLAN MANAGEMENT under CIGNA are all self-funded plans. Ref# TACCARA B. 05012025 
  • UMR/GEHA/UHSS all self-funded plans  
  • Quik Trip  - All of their Plans are Commercial, only have one Grp#44172 -  Self Funded. Ref#Amanda S 06122025 3:41CST. 
  • SANA BENEFITS - All Policies are Self Funded. Verified through provider chat support - Reference number: 911438/Luis.

items.title: Cigna Boilermaker
items.content:
Cigna group number 3334628.
It is extremely important that these are escalated immediately for payor update!
Reference

Updated By: JasferBalboa
Created By: JasferBalboa

items.title: ONN Remark Codes
items.content:
Under Self Insured
  • N864 - This claim is subject to the No Surprises Act provisions that apply to emergency services. Link
Created by: JasferBalboa
Updated by: JasferBalboa

items.title: Postal FEP Pacific
items.content:
For FEP Pacific Customer update to Blue Shield FEP if it has a initial 25 claim number, R policy, and California state. 


Reference: Here.

items.title: TRS / HEALTHSELECT
items.content: Prefix is present as OOS may we process. Since this is a TEXAS claim in the state of Oklahoma it is an OOS policy for NSA.

items.title: Ambetter and BAYLOR SCOTT claims
items.content: EOB Remark Codes surpasses the funding type; it is very important to go by how the EOB was processed (EXCEPT FOR AMBETTER AND BAYLOR & SCOTT)

items.title: FEP or FDERAL FEP
items.content:
Do always make queries with the POC even if we have a instruction with the payor mapping team on how to identify the FEP claim. 

 REFERENCE LINK

deletedItems.title: TPA - SAVERS
deletedItems.content: ALL SAVERS all policies are self-funded

deletedItems.title: SANA BENEFITS - TPA
deletedItems.content: SANA BENEFITS - All Policies are Self Funded. Verified through provider chat support - Reference number: 911438/Luis.
